item.title: Study: SIGLEC-1 Tracks Lupus Response to Anifrolumab
item.description: SIGLEC‑1 expression correlates with disease activity in patients with lupus erythematosus during type I interferon blockade by anifrolumab. Medscape M...

item.title: First UK-Manufactured mRNA Vaccine Approved
item.description: The MHRA has approved Moderna’s Spikevax COVID-19 vaccine, which will be produced in the UK to support NHS vaccination campaigns. Press Association

item.title: Stigma and Inequity: Barriers in Liver Care in Italy
item.description: The AISF urges ending judgmental labels, engaging primary care doctors, and building support networks to improve outcomes in alcohol-related and metab...

item.title: Botox Boom Outpaces UK Safety Regulation
item.description: UK botulinum toxin providers have surged fourfold in two years, raising safety concerns as experts warn regulation has failed to keep pace. Press Asso...

item.title: NICE Backs Perioperative Immunotherapy for Bladder Cancer
item.description: Draft guidance from NICE recommends durvalumab before and after surgery for muscle-invasive bladder cancer following phase 3 trial survival data. Meds...
